properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8 v9 v10 v11

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hungry I come to You For I know You satisfy I am empty but I know Your love does not run dry So I wait for You So I wait for You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I've fallen on my knees Offering all my needs Jesus, You're all This heart is living for

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Broken I run to You For Your arms are open wide I am weary but I know Your touch Restores my life So I wait for You So I wait for You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I've fallen on my knees Offering all my needs Jesus You're all This heart is living for, yeah, yeah

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: I've fallen on my knees Offering all my needs Jesus You're all This heart is living for So I wait for You So I wait for You, yeah

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: So I wait for You So I wait for You, yeah

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: And I've fallen on my knees Offering all my needs Jesus You're all This heart is living for

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Yes, You are Yes, You are

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: I've fallen on my knees Offering all my needs Jesus You're all This heart is living for

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: Hungry I come to You For I know You satisfy I am empty but I know Your love does not run dry
